scripts.install:all: npm --prefix ./eventdb/mvp-node install && npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/api install && npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/vite install && npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/api install && npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/vite install && npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/api install && npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/vite install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup:fitness && npm run setup:coach && npm run setup:passport
scripts.setup:fitness: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_fitness npm --prefix ./eventdb run db:schema && npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/api run db:read-model
scripts.setup:coach: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_coach npm --prefix ./eventdb run db:schema && npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/api run db:read-model
scripts.setup:passport: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_passport npm --prefix ./eventdb run db:schema && npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/api run db:read-model
scripts.dev:fitness: sh -c 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_fitness PORT=3020 npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E=$!; npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A=$!; npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V=$!; trap "kill $E $A $V 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
scripts.dev:coach: sh -c 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_coach PORT=3021 npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E=$!; npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A=$!; npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V=$!; trap "kill $E $A $V 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
scripts.dev:passport: sh -c 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_passport PORT=3022 npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E=$!; npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A=$!; npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V=$!; trap "kill $E $A $V 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
scripts.dev:all: sh -c 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_fitness PORT=3020 npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E1=$!; DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_coach PORT=3021 npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E2=$!; DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_passport PORT=3022 npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E3=$!; npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A1=$!; npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A2=$!; npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A3=$!; npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V1=$!; npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V2=$!; npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V3=$!; trap "kill $E1 $E2 $E3 $A1 $A2 $A3 $V1 $V2 $V3 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
